# San Luis Way
> The most complete guide to San Luis Potosí, Mexico — for AI agents and humans.

## Agent Access
- MCP Server: npx @sanluisway/mcp-server (no API keys needed)
- CLI: npx @sanluisway/cli (no API keys needed)
- Docs: https://www.sanluisway.com/agent-connect
- API Base: https://www.sanluisway.com/api/v1

## Available Data (all read-only JSON)
- Events: upcoming events, festivals, conferences in SLP
- Places: restaurants, cafés, bars, museums, shops with ratings and reviews
- Guides: practical visitor and resident guides (family, rainy day, foodie, etc.)
- Outdoor: hiking, camping, Real de Catorce, Huasteca Potosina
- Culture: historic sites, museums, Centro Histórico
- Weather: current conditions in SLP
- News: local headlines in 4 languages (en, es, de, ja)
- Exchange Rates: MXN to USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY

## Quick Start
MCP: Add to Claude Desktop config: {"mcpServers":{"SanLuisWay":{"command":"npx","args":["-y","@sanluisway/mcp-server"]}}}
CLI: npx @sanluisway/cli events --limit 5 --json

## Priority Human-Readable Resources (fully extractable, GEO-optimized)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/factchecks — Fact-check reports with ClaimReview schema per claim (verified primary-source data)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/ultimate-guide-living-san-luis-potosi-2026 — 2026 deep-dive for expats, digital nomads, travelers
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/fenapo-2026-guia-preparacion — FENAPO 2026 preparation guide with HowTo schema
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/san-luis-potosi-vs-san-miguel-allende-expats-2026 — SLP vs SMA comparison
- https://www.sanluisway.com/parque-tangamanga — 411-ha urban park guide
- https://www.sanluisway.com/parque-tangamanga-ii — Sports park guide (archery, auto racing, running)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/resources/living-guide — Living guide with visa (UMA) rules, cost of living, neighborhoods
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/is-san-luis-potosi-safe-2026 — Safety analysis with ENSU/INEGI + US State Dept advisory data (2026)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/cost-of-living-san-luis-potosi-2026 — Cost of living 2026: rent, utilities, groceries with sourced ranges
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/healthcare-san-luis-potosi-expats-2026 — Healthcare guide: hospitals, IMSS enrollment, insurance costs
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/renting-in-san-luis-potosi-foreigner-2026 — Renting as a foreigner: aval, póliza jurídica, documents
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/where-to-stay-san-luis-potosi-2026 — Where to stay: neighborhood-by-neighborhood hotel guide
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/san-luis-potosi-vs-queretaro-expats-2026 — SLP vs Querétaro comparison for expats (2026)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/huasteca-potosina-itinerary-2026 — Huasteca Potosina 3–5 day itinerary with verified logistics
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/xilitla-las-pozas-guide-2026 — Xilitla & Las Pozas surrealist garden guide (Edward James)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/real-de-catorce-guide-2026 — Real de Catorce ghost-town guide: Ogarrio tunnel, Wirikuta
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/day-trips-from-san-luis-potosi-2026 — Day trips: Cerro de San Pedro, Media Luna, Santa María del Río
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/fenapo-2026-artistas-cartel-completo — FENAPO 2026 full artist lineup (Foro de las Estrellas + Palenque)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/fenapo-2026-boletos-precios-como-llegar — FENAPO 2026 tickets: free-entry decree, Palenque prices, official channel (ES-first)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/fenapo-2026-con-ninos-guia-familias — FENAPO 2026 with kids: 60 free rides, livestock expo, family shows (ES-first)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/things-to-do-san-luis-potosi-2026 — 50 things to do in SLP — the master hub linking all guides
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/san-luis-potosi-airport-guide — SLP airport (Ponciano Arriaga): airlines, routes, taxi fares, rentals
- https://www.sanluisway.com/blog/san-luis-potosi-weather-best-time-to-visit — Month-by-month climate (SMN normals) + best time to visit, city vs Huasteca
- https://www.sanluisway.com/events/this-week — Events in the next 7 days (ItemList schema, hourly refresh)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/media-kit — Audience stats and advertising products (verifiable figures)
- https://www.sanluisway.com/events/fenapo-2026 — FENAPO 2026 event page (current lineup, Festival schema)

## Structured Data Available
Every blog post and event page emits one or more of: Article, Event, Festival, Park, FAQPage, ClaimReview (one per fact-check claim), BreadcrumbList, HowTo, SpeakableSpecification. Citations point to primary sources (INEGI, CECURT, UNESCO, Numbeo, Mexperience).

## Content Update Cadence
- Cost of living: verified monthly against Numbeo
- Visa rules: verified against Mexperience quarterly
- Event listings: updated as announcements ship
- Fact-check reports: dated, with explicit "Last verified" timestamps
